subject: english
textbook: 义务教育教科书·英语（PEP）（三年级起点）五年级上册

passages.title: 致同学
passages.author: 编者
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: 你们好！祝贺你们升入了小学高年级。
学习了两年的英语，你们一定收获不小吧？
在这本书里，你们将认识两个新朋友：Oliver和Robin。
Oliver是个腼腆的男孩子，来自澳大利亚。
Robin是一个智能机器人，它和书中的同学们一起经历了很多有趣的事情。
当然，你们还会和吴斌斌、陈杰、张鹏、Sarah、Amy、Mike和John等老朋友一起继续学习更多的英语知识，了解更多的中外文化。
大熊Zoom和小松鼠Zip也会陪伴你们一道继续快乐地学习。
学习英语需要多听、多读、多说、多写。
在五年级的教材中我们为你们增加了听的活动（Let’s try）和读写活动（Read and write）。
开始如果你们有听不懂、读不懂、写不对的地方，这很正常，不要着急。
要坚持多听、多读、多说、多写、多模仿，学习一些听说读写的方法，你们一定会进步。
在英语学习中有很多有趣的规律性的知识，也许你们已经发现了一些，这册教材也专门为你们设计了这样的活动（Let’s wrap it up），引导你们仔细观察、发现并总结规律。
及时归纳总结这些规律，对你们今后的英语学习一定会大有帮助。
亲爱的同学们，愿你们和书里的主人公一起享受小学生活的美好时光。

passages.title: What’s he like?
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Ms Wang will be our new Chinese teacher.
We have a new PE teacher.

passages.title: Let’s talk
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Wu Binbin: Do you know Mr Young?
Oliver: No, I don’t. Who is he?
Wu Binbin: He’s our music teacher.
Wu Binbin: No, he isn’t. He’s old.
Oliver: Great! I like funny teachers.
Miss White: We’ll have an English party next Tuesday!
Miss White: What can you do for the party, children?
Zhang Peng: I can sing English songs.
Miss White: Wonderful! How about you, John?
John: I can do some kung fu!
Mr Ma: Today we’ll learn some kung fu.
Mr Ma: Can you do any kung fu, John?
Mr Ma: Can you do any kung fu, Oliver?
Mr Ma: No problem. I can help you.
Sarah: Your room is really nice!
Mike: There is a big bed.
Zhang Peng: Yes. I like my bed.
Mike: There is a nice photo, too.
Zhang Peng: Hey, my computer is here on the desk.
There is a desk in the picture.
There is a plate on the desk.
There is a banana on the plate.
Zhang Peng: This is the living room.
Mike: Wow! There are so many pictures here.
Zhang Peng: Yes. My father can draw very well.
Sarah: There are so many plants here, too.
Zhang Peng: They’re my grandmother’s plants.
Zhang Peng: My grandparents have a garden in front of their house.
Zhang Peng: There are lots of flowers in it.
There are two dogs in the picture.

passages.title: Let's talk
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Chen Jie: Hey, Ms Wang will be our new Chinese teacher.
Chen Jie: Yes. She’s my mother!
John: Grandpa! Look at my picture.
Grandfather: Great! What do you have on Thursdays?
John: I have maths, English and music.
Grandfather: Oh, I love music! Who’s your music teacher?
John: No. He’s funny. What do you do on Thursdays, Grandpa?
Grandfather: Oh, I have a cooking class with your grandma!
Zhang Peng: Hi, Sarah. What’s that?
Zhang Peng: Do you often read books in this park?
Sarah: No, I don’t. Do you often play football here?
Zhang Peng: Yes, I do. I like this park very much.
Mother: What would you like to eat?
Sarah: What would you like to drink?
Father: I’d like some water. I’m thirsty!
Zhang Peng: Noodles. I love beef noodles. They’re delicious.
Zhang Peng: What’s your favourite food?
Zhang Peng: Well, let’s see. We have beef noodles and fish sandwiches today.
Miss White: Children, let’s go to the forest!
Zhang Peng: Is there a river in the forest, Miss White?
Zhang Peng: Is there a lake, Miss White?
Miss White: Yes, there is and there are some small boats.
Zhang Peng: Cool! Let’s go boating.
Zhang Peng: The nature park is so quiet!
Miss White: Yes, Zhang Peng. There aren’t many people.
Zhang Peng: Are there any tall buildings in the nature park?
Zhang Peng: Are there any animals?
Miss White: Yes, there are. There are ducks and rabbits.

passages.title: Meet Robin!
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: He can speak Chinese and English.
He is very helpful at home.
He makes me finish my homework!

passages.title: Story time
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Zip: Our new PE teacher will come today!
Zip: I only know he’s a good football player.
Zoom: He must be tall and strong!
Zoom: You’re very thin and so short.
Rabbit: Sure. Let me show you.
Dog: Our new PE teacher is a great football player, too.
Rabbit: I am your new PE teacher!
Zoom: It’s a new school year. I need to do some shopping.
Zip: We have English on Mondays and Wednesdays.
Zoom: I need some notebooks and pencils.
Zip: We have maths on Tuesdays.
Zip: On Thursdays, we have art.
Zoom: I need a box of crayons.
Zip: We have PE on Fridays.
Zoom: I want a new football, please. We can play with it on the weekend.
Zip: I’m sorry, Zoom. We don’t have enough money. I’ll put back the football.
Zip: What would you like to eat?
Zip: No problem. I have tomatoes, carrots, and onions.
Zip: The vegetables are so fresh!
Zoom: Dinner at the farm is great!
There is a can beside the river.
Can: I want to go home.
A naughty bear kicks the can.
The can flies over Rabbit and Monkey.
Monkey: Look at that poor can.
The can falls between two fish.
Mr Fish: Here comes a can.
Ms Fish: Let’s give it to Zoom.

passages.title: Robin’s advice
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Robin: You look tired. What do you have on Fridays?
Robin: Do you often play sports?
Wu Binbin: No, I don’t. I don’t like sports.
Robin: What do you often do on the weekend?
Wu Binbin: I often watch TV.
You should play sports every day.
Here is a new schedule for you.

passages.title: Read and write
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: My favourite food is ice cream.
It is sweet. I don't like beef but chicken is OK. Onions are my favourite vegetable. I like salad very much.
My favourite food is chicken. It is delicious.
I like vegetables but not carrots.
Here you are! Chicken ice cream!

passages.title: Recycle 1
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Chen Jie: Who’s your Chinese teacher?
David: Look at that picture. That’s Ms Zhang, our Chinese teacher.
Chen Jie: What’s she like? Is she kind?
David: Yes. She’s very kind, but she’s strict sometimes.

passages.title: Monday
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: It is sunny today. I am at Willow Primary School.
It is so pretty. There are many yellow flowers.
The teacher, Ms Brown, is very helpful.
Teachers and students often eat lunch at school.
Some of them have beef and drink tea.
Some love green beans and ice cream.
After lunch, we have a reading class with Mr Reed.

passages.title: Unit Four
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: We’ll have an English party next Tuesday.
What can you do for the party?
I can sing! La la la ...

passages.title: What can you do?
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Sorry. I have an English class at 3 o’clock.
What can you do, Wu Binbin?
I can do some kung fu, too!

passages.title: Who can be my friend?
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Do you want a new friend?
I can speak English and Chinese.
I can do some kung fu.
I can play ping-pong, but I can’t swim.
Please send me an email at robin@urfriend.cn.

passages.title: Story time
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Snake: Mmm ... Here comes some tasty food.
Rat: Dear snake, wait a minute.
Rat: I can do things for you.
Snake: Oh! What can you do?
Rat: Then I can dance for you.
Snake: There is a lake near here.
Rat: No! Don’t throw me into the lake, please!
Rat: Now I can swim away.
Zoom: Let’s go to a nature park!
Zip: We can take some pictures there.
Zip: Look at that beautiful bridge.
Zoom: The mountains and trees are beautiful, too.
Zip: There is a house over there!
Zoom: Are there any people in the house?
Zip: Let’s go and have a look!
Zoom: There is so much corn!
Zip: There is a koala over there.
Zoom: Why don’t you take a picture of me?
Zip: Let’s take pictures of the koala first.

passages.title: Unit Five
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: My father can draw very well.
There are many pretty flowers in it.

passages.title: There is a big bed
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: There is a table beside the bed.

passages.title: An email to Robin
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: I just moved into an old house.
There are pencils and crayons on the floor.
There are pictures and photos everywhere.
Oh, no! I see a mouse behind my computer!
I live near the nature park.

passages.title: Robin draws
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Robin is at Mr Jones’ house.
There is a nature park near the house.
In the park there is a high mountain.
In front of the mountain there is a small village.
There is a lake near the village.
There are many ducks on the lake.

passages.title: Recycle 2 Having fun in a park
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: The children will go to a nature park this weekend.
Listen again and answer the questions.

passages.title: The children are in the park
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Sarah: Are there any lakes in the forest?
Amy: Is there a restaurant in the forest?
Robin: No, there isn‛t, but there is one in front of the hill.
Zhang Peng: Are there any villages in the nature park?
Robin: Let me think. Yes, there is one on the mountain.
Zhang Peng: Is there a robot in the park?
Robin: Yes, there is one between Zhang Peng and Sarah!

passages.title: In a dark, dark wood
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: In a dark, dark wood there is a dark, dark house.
And in the dark, dark house there is a dark, dark hallway.
And in the dark, dark hallway there are some dark, dark stairs.
And down the dark, dark stairs there is a dark, dark room.
And in the dark, dark room there is a dark, dark cupboard.
And in the dark, dark cupboard there is a dark, dark box.
And in the dark, dark box there is a big mouse!

passages.title: Who‛s your teacher?
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Who’s your English teacher at school?
Who’s your English teacher at school?
Is she pretty or tall or short?
Who’s your Chinese teacher at school?
Who’s your Chinese teacher at school?
Is he funny or young or old?

passages.title: Days of the week
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday,
Days for school and days for fun.

passages.title: What would you like to eat today?
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: What would you like to eat today? Eat today? Eat today?
What would you like to eat today? Something sweet to eat.

passages.title: What can you do?
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: What can you do? What can you do?
I can do kung fu. I can do kung fu.
I can dance and draw cartoons.

passages.title: Useful expressions
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: What do you have on Thursdays?
I have maths, English and music.
我有数学、英语和音乐课。
Do you often read books in this park?
你经常在这个公园里看书吗？
不，我不经常在这里看书。
What would you like to eat?
What would you like to drink?
What can you do for the party, children?
孩子们，你们能为联欢会做什么？
Can you do any kung fu, John?
There are so many pictures here.
Is there a river in the forest, Miss White?
怀特小姐，森林里有河吗？
Are there any tall buildings in the nature park?
不，自然公园里没有高楼。

passages.title: Proverbs
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: You can't judge a book by its cover.
For the hard-working, a week has seven days; for the lazy, seven tomorrows.
勤奋的人，一个星期有七天；懒惰的人，一个星期有七个明天。
An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
每天一个苹果，医生远离我。
East or west, home is best.

_review_checklist: 1) 对照原 PDF 核对每一句，尤其注意错字 / 漏字 / 拼音
2) 删除非课文内容（练习题、词语表等误抓）
